name: composer-sync-check
description: Detects when Composer dependencies may be out of sync after Git branch changes or modifications to composer.json / composer.lock.

commands.title: Composer Sync Check: Run Composer Install
Composer Sync Check: Force Dependency Check
Composer Sync Check: Test Notification Balloon

composerSyncCheck.command.description: Command used to install Composer dependencies.

composerSyncCheck.checkIntervalMinutes.description: Interval in minutes for periodic dependency checks. Set to 0 to disable.

composerSyncCheck.checkOnGitBranchChange.description: Check dependency sync when Git branch changes are detected.

composerSyncCheck.checkOnComposerFilesCh.description: Check dependency sync when composer.json or composer.lock changes.

composerSyncCheck.composerJsonPath.description: Relative path to composer.json inside each workspace folder.

composerSyncCheck.composerLockPath.description: Relative path to composer.lock inside each workspace folder.

composerSyncCheck.showNotifications.description: Show warning notifications when dependencies may be out of sync.

composerSyncCheck.debugMode.description: Enable additional debug logging in the output channel.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
